name: /feature --skip-ui-pin operator bypass is logged to the merkle-chained audit log per the operator bypass pattern
command: mkdir -p compliance repo/src/components && (cd repo && git init -q && printf 'export const Button=()=>1\n' > src/components/Button.tsx) && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/feature.sh" --feature-id feat-x --skip-ui-pin --diff-stub touched=src/components/Button.tsx --audit-log compliance/audit.log --operator alice --now 2026-05-14T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && grep -q '"event":"ui-pin-bypass"' compliance/audit.log && grep -q '"operator":"alice"' compliance/audit.log && grep -q '"feature_id":"feat-x"' compliance/audit.log && echo ok 1>&2
